title: fab doctor --archive-history subcommand for session-by-session attempt audit
description: Add a new `fab doctor --archive-history [--since=Nd]` subcommand that reads events.jsonl tail, filters for session_archive_attempted events (new schema variant from TASK-01), groups by session_id, and renders a bilingual table showing: session_id (truncated), last_attempted ts, outcome, candidates_proposed, covered_through_ts gap (time since last covered to now). Provides observability for E5 cron (did it run? did silent-skip happen?) and for general audit (which sessions have been archived vs not).

files.change:
Add new exported async function `runDoctorArchiveHistory(projectRoot, options): Promise<ArchiveHistoryReport>` that:
  1. Read events.jsonl via existing readEventLedger
  2. Filter for event_type === 'session_archive_attempted' AND ts >= sinceMs (default: 7d)
  3. Group by session_id, keep most recent attempt per session (max ts)
  4. Project each entry: { session_id_short, last_attempted_at, outcome, candidates_proposed, covered_through_ts, age_since_covered_hours }
  5. Sort by last_attempted_at DESC (most recent first)
  6. Return ArchiveHistoryReport { entries: [...], total: N, since_ms: ... }
Also define ArchiveHistoryReport TypeScript type.

(1) Add `--archive-history` flag parsing (parallel to existing --cite-coverage from rc.20/rc.24). (2) Add `--since=<duration>` flag (default '7d', parse to ms via existing duration parser if present else inline parse). (3) When --archive-history is active: call runDoctorArchiveHistory, render via new renderArchiveHistoryReport function. (4) renderArchiveHistoryReport produces bilingual stdout (per fabric_language): header row + N data rows + footer summary line. Format:
  ```
  Archive history (last 7 days, N sessions)
  | Session | Last attempt | Outcome | Candidates | Covered gap |
  | ------- | ------------ | ------- | ---------- | ----------- |
  | abc1... | 2026-05-19 13:42 | proposed | 3 | 0h |
  | def2... | 2026-05-18 23:00 | skipped_no_signal | 0 | 14h |
  ```
(5) Empty result → '暂无归档历史记录 (--since=Nd 窗口内)' bilingual.

Add 4 test cases: (1) basic — 3 distinct sessions each with 1 attempted event, expect 3 entries in report; (2) multiple attempts for same session — only most recent kept; (3) since-filter — events older than sinceMs excluded; (4) empty events.jsonl → empty report no crash.
Add 2 test cases: (1) --archive-history flag triggers correct service call with default --since=7d; (2) --since=14d parses correctly to 14*24*60*60*1000 ms.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts to confirm runDoctorXxx function shape patterns (per rc.20 runDoctorCiteCoverage precedent).
Read packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts to confirm flag parsing structure.
Define ArchiveHistoryReport type with entries[] + total + since_ms fields.
Implement runDoctorArchiveHistory per the algorithm in files[].change.
Implement renderArchiveHistoryReport with bilingual rendering (zh-CN + en variants).
Add 4 service unit tests + 2 CLI integration tests.
Verify the empty-result message renders correctly in both languages.
Verify session_id truncation is consistent (8 chars + '...' suffix).

reference.pattern: rc.20 runDoctorCiteCoverage + rc.24 contract metric extension (parallel structure)
reference.examples: rc.20 cite-coverage report has same bilingual table rendering + --since flag pattern that rc.25 mirrors.

rationale.chosen_approach: Subcommand parallel to --cite-coverage and --cite-contract (rc.20/rc.24). Reuses existing doctor command structure + i18n + flag parsing.
alternatives_considered: Standalone fab archive-history subcommand (rejected: doctor is the established read-only audit umbrella, --cite-coverage precedent set the pattern)
Just grep events.jsonl manually (rejected: user-facing observability needs structured table)
decision_factors: doctor command consolidation reduces CLI surface
Read-only audit, no risk of damaging state
rationale.tradeoffs: Adds a new subcommand surface to doctor; mitigation: existing structure handles N subcommands cleanly per rc.24 evidence.

manual_checks: Run fab doctor --archive-history on this pcf project (which has 21 knowledge_proposed events) — verify output
Run with --since=1d → fewer entries; --since=30d → more entries
success_metrics: 6 new test cases (4 service + 2 CLI) all pass
unit: doctor.test.ts only most recent per session
doctor.test.ts empty events return empty report

criteria: cli doctor.ts contains exact string '--since' for duration parsing
cli doctor.test.ts adds ≥2 new test cases
pnpm test passes (both server and cli packages)
